page.title: Clinical glossary
page.subtitle: Terminology used across LiverRa: Couinaud anatomy, vessels, lesion classes, and abbreviations.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search terms, Latin names, or abbreviations…

II.name: Segment II
II.latin: Segmentum II (lobus hepatis sinister, laterale superius)

III.name: Segment III
III.latin: Segmentum III (lobus hepatis sinister, laterale inferius)

V.name: Segment V
V.latin: Segmentum V (lobus hepatis dexter, anterius inferius)

VI.name: Segment VI
VI.latin: Segmentum VI (lobus hepatis dexter, posterius inferius)

VII.name: Segment VII
VII.latin: Segmentum VII (lobus hepatis dexter, posterius superius)

VIII.name: Segment VIII
VIII.latin: Segmentum VIII (lobus hepatis dexter, anterius superius)

portal.name: Portal vein
portal.role: Afferent venous trunk — inflow from gut + spleen

hepatic.name: Hepatic vein
hepatic.role: Efferent venous trunk — outflow to inferior vena cava

hcc.name: Hepatocellular carcinoma
hcc.role: Primary liver malignancy arising from hepatocytes; typically cirrhotic background.

icc.name: Intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma
icc.role: Primary biliary-tract malignancy arising from intrahepatic bile ducts.

metastasis.name: Metastasis
metastasis.role: Secondary malignancy — commonly colorectal, pancreatic, breast, or neuroendocrine primaries.

fnh.name: Focal nodular hyperplasia
fnh.role: Benign hyperplastic lesion; central scar characteristic on MRI.

hemangioma.name: Hemangioma
hemangioma.role: Benign vascular lesion; peripheral nodular enhancement typical.

cyst.name: Simple cyst
cyst.role: Benign fluid-filled lesion; no enhancement expected.

native.name: Non-contrast (native)
native.role: Baseline CT acquired before contrast injection.

arterial.name: Late arterial
arterial.role: ~30s post-injection; hepatic artery enhancement — HCC and FNH conspicuous.

portal.name: Portal venous
portal.role: ~65–75s; liver parenchyma maximally enhanced — metastases conspicuous.

flr.name: Future Liver Remnant
flr.role: Post-resection liver volume expressed as % of total liver volume. Target ≥30–40% in healthy liver, higher with impairment.

alpps.name: Associating Liver Partition and Portal vein ligation for Staged hepatectomy
alpps.role: Two-stage hepatectomy technique that accelerates FLR hypertrophy.

ruo.name: Research Use Only
ruo.role: Regulatory scope — output is not cleared for clinical decision-making.

sop_uid.name: SOP Instance UID
sop_uid.role: DICOM unique identifier per object — regenerated on every finalize.

dicom_seg.name: DICOM Segmentation
dicom_seg.role: Standard DICOM IOD for 3D mask export.

dicom_sr.name: DICOM Structured Report
dicom_sr.role: Standard DICOM IOD for structured clinical findings.

pacs.name: Picture Archiving and Communication System
pacs.role: Hospital image storage + routing system; DICOM-native.
